response.justification: A strong, seasoned polyglot engineer with genuine staff-level breadth (TypeScript/Node, AWS CDK, embedded, mentoring, and recent MCP/agentic-tooling work), but the resume does not demonstrate the core requirement of 8+ years building production-grade GenAI solutions. AI exposure is recent and narrow (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks), with no evidence of RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation/optimization, or Python. Worth a screening conversation to probe the depth of the agentic/MCP work, but the GenAI track record is thin for a Staff GenAI role.
strengths: Deep senior/staff engineering breadth across TypeScript/Node, cloud (AWS CDK), and distributed systems
Direct MCP and agentic-workflow tooling experience relevant to the role
Strong technical leadership signals: mentoring, talks, workshops, TDD/CI craftsmanship
concerns: No demonstrated 8+ years of production GenAI/AI solution development
No evidence of RAG, vector databases, or LLM performance optimization
Python not listed despite being a primary required language
